name: Grinkrak's Looncourt
inspire: Before a friendly fighter uses a Core ability, you can pick a quest to attempt that you have not already attempted. After you complete that quest, immediately use its Reward ability. You cannot attempt multiple quests at the same time. You can abandon a quest in a Power step instead of playing a Power card.

abilities.name: I Dub Thee...
abilities.flavorText: Grinkrak spurs his gitz to the heights of mediocrity.
abilities.rulesText: You can use this ability once per battle round before a friendly Loonknight ({icon:minion}) uses a Core ability. That fighter is dubbed until the end of the game.

abilities.name: Quest: Conquer da Realm
abilities.rulesText:
You complete this quest after an Action step if your warband holds 2 or more treasure tokens and holds more treasure tokens than your opponent's warband.

Reward: You can Inspire a friendly Loonknight ({icon:minion}). If a dubbed friendly fighter is holding a treasure token when you complete this quest, you can also Inspire your leader ({icon:leader}) and then draw up to 2 Power cards.

abilities.name: Quest: Go Forth and Wallop
abilities.rulesText:
If you pick this quest, dubbed friendly fighters have +1 Move for the rest of the game. You complete this quest after an Action step if there are 2 or more friendly fighters in enemy territory.

Reward: You can Inspire up to 2 friendly Loonknights ({icon:minion}). If your leader ({icon:leader}) is in enemy territory when you complete this quest, you can also Inspire your leader ({icon:leader}).

abilities.name: Quest: Slay da Horde
abilities.rulesText:
If you pick this quest, dubbed friendly fighters' melee weapons have +1 Attack dice for the rest of the game. You complete this quest after an Action step if any enemy fighters with a total Bounty characteristic of 2 or more are slain.

Reward: You can Inspire a friendly fighter. If any of those enemy fighters were slain by a dubbed friendly fighter's Attack, you can Inspire a friendly Loonknight ({icon:minion}) and your leader ({icon:leader}) instead.

abilities.name: Quest: Slay da Scary Fing
abilities.rulesText:
If you pick this quest, for the rest of the game, dubbed friendly fighters' melee weapons have Grievous ({icon:grievous}) if the target has a Bounty characteristic of 2 or more. You complete this quest after an Action step if an enemy fighter with a Bounty characteristic of 2 or more is slain.

Reward: You can Inspire up to 2 friendly Loonknights ({icon:minion}) and your leader ({icon:leader}).
